MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dan Berko, Esq. (415-771-6174) specially appearing for Plaintiff/opposing party Heidi Denton.
Laura Flynn, Esq. (415-981-6630 ext 293) of Low Ball & Lynch for Defendant/Moving party Kwun Shiu Yan Fung.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Counsel submits to the tentative ruling. Defendat's Counsel seeks clarification on statute of limitations. The Court did not buy the statute of limitation argument and concurs with the 1 year statute of limitation and not necessarily 3 years. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. (1) Complaint sufficiently alleges the nature of the contract between Plaintiff and Defendants; (2) Demurrer does not lie to a part of a cause of action and, therefore, the issue of release of claims cannot be addressed at this time; (3) Manefee is distinguishable as the notice in this case is not alleged to be defective on its face. Nothing on the face of the complaint shows that the statute of limitations has run. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
